description: Simulate a perioperative patient monitoring transition by configuring two 'Pre-Op' devices (Pulse Oximeter and Noninvasive Blood Pressure monitor) and three 'Operating Room' devices (Multiparameter Monitor, Capnograph/CO2 monitor, and Infusion Pump). Verify data flow within the Vital Signs clinical application. Document the transition in a handoff checklist at /home/ga/Desktop/periop_handoff_checklist.txt, including the devices used in both phases, their monitored parameters, and a summary note.
